jsonLd.title: Woodland is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Woodland in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
